---
id: bill-a-customer
title: "Bill a customer"
description: "Triggers immediate billing for a customer. Creates an invoice from all balance lines currently in the customer's balance."
sidebar_label: "Bill a customer"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

  children={"Bill a customer"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/Billing/Customer"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Triggers immediate billing for a customer. Creates an invoice from all balance lines currently in the customer's balance.
